'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 8''' was the eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 20]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] {{C|END 5-6}}
**<small>Rebel forces and the fleet that destroyed the second Death Star.</small>
*[[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|The Naboo Blockade]] {{C|NAB 5-6}}
**<small>The Neimoidian puppets of the Sith.</small>
*[[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]] {{C|NAS 1-4}}
**<small>Leader of the Gungans who played a vital role in the Battle of Naboo.</small>
*[[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] {{C|LOB 1-4}}
**<small>A Human who became a cyborg, Lobot was LAndo Calrissian's faithful aide.</small>
*[[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] {{C|TAT 5-8}}
**<small>The isolated town known for slavery, illegal trade and Podracing.</small>
*[[Battle droid/Legends|Battle Droids]] {{C|BAT 1-2}}
**<small>Unquestioning footsoldiers of the droid armies built for the Trade Federation.</small>
*[[Moisture farm/Legends|Moisture Farming]] {{C|MOI 1-2}}
**<small>Technology that enabled settlers to eke out an existence in Tatooine's deserts.</small>
*[[Tantive IV/Legends|Tantive IV]] and Escape Pod {{C|TAN 1-2}}
**<small>Princess Leia's Corellian corvette served her well until captured by Darth Vader.</small>
